**Which AI Agent do you want to add?**
(e.g., Devin, OpenHands, Cursor Headless)

**YAML Configuration Snippet**
If you already figured out how to run it via CLI, paste the YAML config here so we can add it to the official docs!

```yaml
agent-name:
  command: "..."
```
